name: Max Stock Ltd.
summary: Max Stock Ltd. operates various discount stores in Israel. Its stores provide products in various categories, including school supplies, arts and crafts, disposable dishes, tools and hardware, clothing and textiles, toys and leisure, birthdays, plastic ware, accessories and gifts, baking utensils, cleaning products, and furniture and d√É¬©cor. The company operates 50 stores. Max Stock Ltd. is based in Holon, Israel.
